name_en: New Small Size Praphy Shoulder Bag, featuring a crescent shape, with the classic large metal logo [FENDI] decorating the bottom of the bag. The bag's contour fits the body's lines perfectly, full of fashion sense when worn on the shoulder, simply a walking trendsetter!
name_cn:
New Small Size Praphy Shoulder Bag, featuring a crescent shape, with the classic large metal logo [FENDI] decorating the bottom of the bag. The bag's contour fits the body's lines perfectly, full of fashion sense when worn on the shoulder, simply a walking trendsetter!
Small: Size 20x7.5x13cm
Style: 306
